description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

v1.18.3 New Features
• Today's year (Western and Japanese calendar) now displays on the top page — Appears in small text below the date and day of the week, formatted like "2026/Reiwa 8".

v1.18.3 Fixes
• Fixed bug where Tayanagi Loop "Factory Front direction" route only showed stops up to City Hall — When boarding from Hanno City Hall, the full route now displays: Factory Front → Sengen → Municipal Housing → ... → Hanno Station.
• Consolidated Hanno City Hall (Mu-Ma bus) and City Hall Front (5931bus) as a single stop — These two separate stops are now combined into one display.

v1.18.3 Notes
• Event detail modals for the Tourism Association, Civic Hall, and similar venues will now show "🔗 Information Source URL" as a clickable link (display feature added in v1.18.2; data delivery added in this release).

v1.18.4 New Features
• "UV" (ultraviolet strength) added to the weather section — Displays in color, for example "☀ UV Very Strong". Colors follow Japan Meteorological Agency standards in five levels: Weak, Moderate, Strong, Very Strong, and Extreme. Check before heading out to decide whether you need a hat or sunscreen.
